triton_backward_parity_smoke.read: BF16 duplicate-index output differs from atomic order only; backward tensors match torch exactly in the smoke.

local_slice.read: The Triton weighted-scatter backend is now a real forward+backward local helper-boundary win versus the old Triton forward-only path, but it is still a drop-in microstage candidate until an e2e gate reaches step metrics.

e2e_attempts.intended_delta: CANARY_STANDARD_EP_WEIGHTED_SCATTER_BACKEND=triton with Triton scatter backward in torchtitan/ops/scatter_add.py
e2e_attempts.failure: SIGABRT / GPU memory access fault while initializing or entering MORI/SDMA hot-weight all-reduce

e2e_attempts.intended_delta: CANARY_STANDARD_EP_WEIGHTED_SCATTER_BACKEND=triton with Triton scatter backward in torchtitan/ops/scatter_add.py
e2e_attempts.failure: SIGABRT / GPU memory access fault while initializing or entering MORI/SDMA hot-weight all-reduce

decision.read: The 8x materialization gate is inconclusive for the Triton scatter-backward backend because both attempts failed before any train step and before the weighted combine/scatter path. Keep the local kernel result as a slice win, but do not claim tok/s or TFLOPs uplift.
decision.next_action: Investigate the pre-step MORI/SDMA hot-weight process-group interaction separately; for MoE/EP performance, continue toward a first-class compact-row helper VJP plus weighted dX/dTopK return contract rather than another drop-in scatter-only swap.
